message.content:
Search these 4 frontend files for how to get the department name (中文名) in each context. I need to know:

1. `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\app\PC\StaffPage\OCSystem\OCApplication.vue` - OC 盖章/付款. The department is `applicationParams.department` (numeric ID). How to get the department label/name? Check if there's a department list/options in this component.

2. `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\app\PC\StaffPage\OCSystem\components\Loan\AddOCInitiatedLoanPage.vue` - LR 借款. The department is `loanApprovalDetail.departmentId` (numeric ID). Check for department name/label.

3. `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\app\PC\StaffPage\OCSystem\components\LoanStrikeBalance\AddLoanStrikeBalance.vue` - LR 冲账. The department is `editData.group` (numeric ID). Check for department name/label.

4. `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\app\PC\StaffPage\Reimbursement\ApplicationManagements.vue` - 报销. Uses `store.state.userInfo.department_id`. Check for department name in userInfo.

For each file, search for keywords like: department, 部门, options, label, name, departmentName, department_name

Also check `store.state.userInfo` in `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-frontend\src\store\state.ts` for department_name field.

Just return the findings, don't make any changes.
